column1: Will you show _____ one of _____ photos? (I, you)
I've got more photos than _____ has. _____ are more interesting than _____ . (she, she, I)
Some of _____ friends came to see _____ . (we, we)
_____ ticket is on the table. Is _____ ticket there too? (you, she)
Tom and Jonathan, you must cook breakfast _____ . (you)
